name: azure-static-web-editor
description: Read, write, and manage static website files in Azure Blob Storage ($web container). Includes AI image generation via DALL-E and favicon creation.

AZURE_STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING.title: Azure Storage connection string
AZURE_STORAGE_CONNECTION_STRING.description: Found in Azure Portal → your storage account → Security + networking → Access keys

OPENAI_API_KEY.title: OpenAI API key
OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Required for AI image generation via DALL-E. Found at platform.openai.com/api-keys

AZURE_STORAGE_CONTAINER_NAME.title: Azure Blob container name
AZURE_STORAGE_CONTAINER_NAME.description: The container hosting your static website. Press enter to use the default.
